title: Struggle for Economic Independence
description: Quiz on post-independence economic challenges in Africa, including debt, drought, and regional economic communities.

questions.question: During which period did Africa achieve substantial economic growth?
What were two principal factors adversely affecting African developments in the 1980s and 1990s?
What happened to the price of Africa's raw material exports compared to manufactured imports since the 1960s?
options: They dropped ten or twenty times
questions.correctAnswer: They dropped ten or twenty times

questions.question: Which institutions did African governments turn to for emergency foreign exchange?
options: European Union and World Trade Organisation

questions.question: What treaty established the African Economic Community (AEC)?
Which regional economic community was formed in December 1994?
COMESA replaced which earlier organisation that had existed since 1981?
Which REC covers West African states?
Which countries are members of IGAD?
options: Ethiopia, Sudan, South Sudan, Eritrea, Kenya, Uganda, and Djibouti
questions.correctAnswer: Ethiopia, Sudan, South Sudan, Eritrea, Kenya, Uganda, and Djibouti

questions.question: What was the 1980 Lagos Plan of Action for?
